description: This video demonstrates how to use Binance's live chat feature to communicate with a live agent. It covers navigating to the support section, using pre-selected options, and how to escalate issues if the bot's response is unsatisfactory.
topic_summary: Learn how to effectively use Binance's live chat for customer support, including navigating the interface and escalating issues to live agents [t=0:32 - t=1:53].
